name: Email Ingestion :: Candidate Processor V1
description: Common processor for Gmail, Outlook and replay flows. Applies cheap deterministic triage first, uses Information Extractor only for ambiguous/manual emails, and posts candidates to the despesas backend.

attributes.name: classification
attributes.description: Use only one of RECURRING_BILL, MANUAL_PURCHASE, FINANCIAL_TRANSACTION, IRRELEVANT

attributes.name: merchantOrPayee
attributes.description: Best merchant, provider or payee name found in the email

attributes.name: suggestedCategoryName
attributes.description: Portuguese spending category name suggestion, concise and capitalized

attributes.name: suggestedSubcategoryName
attributes.description: Portuguese spending subcategory suggestion when obvious

attributes.name: totalAmount
attributes.description: Total amount in BRL using dot decimal separator

attributes.name: summary
attributes.description: Short summary of the financial event in Portuguese

attributes.name: confidence
attributes.description: Confidence between 0 and 1. Prefer lower values when the email is incomplete or ambiguous.

attributes.name: occurredOn
attributes.description: Purchase or billing date when clearly present

options.systemPromptTemplate: You classify and extract only financial email candidates. Be concise, structured, conservative on confidence, and never invent values. Prefer IRRELEVANT when the text is marketing or social noise. Prefer REVIEW-grade confidence when category or amount is uncertain.

versionMetadata.description: Common processor for Gmail, Outlook and replay flows. Applies cheap deterministic triage first, uses Information Extractor only for ambiguous/manual emails, and posts candidates to the despesas backend.
